title: Main Subject in Unresolved Setting
story_text: A small question hangs over the scene as image 1 shows main subject remaining visible in unresolved setting, leaving the frame curious, quiet, and slightly uncertain. The same subject appears to continue into the next moment, and the next visible moment keeps part of its meaning just out of reach. Soon after, image 2 shows main subject remaining visible in unresolved setting, leaving the frame curious, quiet, and slightly uncertain. The same subject appears to continue into the next moment, and the next visible moment keeps part of its meaning just out of reach. Soon after, image 3 shows main subject remaining visible in unresolved setting, leaving the frame curious, quiet, and slightly uncertain.
